prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 电子信息/通信类、电气工程及其自动化等专 业社会热度高热推荐，计算机类持续高热，相关专业报考竞争可能加剧；江西省2026年普通高考考生总数约474900人，较2025年总人数472480略有增加，竞争基数小幅扩大；上海大学位于上海市，地域吸引力强，对江西省考生有较强吸引力；该校在江西省招生规模较大（理科约180人左右），属于 该校在外省的主要生源地之一。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for science (physics category) was approximately 7938 → 8186 → 7692 → 9003 → 9970, showing an overall fluctuating and backward trend, with a particularly noticeable backward shift in the last two years. In 2024, it shifted back by about 1311 places compared to 2023, and in 2025, it shifted back by about 967 places compared to 2024, accumulating a total backward shift of about 2278 places over the past two years. The baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 9970. The provincial science (physics category) enrollment plan was 177 in 2021, 165 in 2022, 165 in 2023, 173 in 2024, and 179 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 182, a slight expansion of about 1.7% compared to 2025, with limited impact on the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; ranked approximately 60th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, with a gradual decline from 43rd in 2021 to 60th, placing it at an upper-middle 211 level. During the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, its reputation evaluation is clearly negative, mainly due to academic misconduct incidents (such as dean's paper fraud), which may suppress some candidates' application intentions. It ranks 48th in Douyin popularity, with relatively hot evaluations and some exposure on short video platforms. It has only two A- or above disciplines: Sociology (A) and World History (A-). The science enrollment majors are mainly engineering fields such as electronic information, electrical, and materials, which have low correlation with the university's advantageous disciplines (Sociology, World History).

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Electronic Information/Communication Engineering and Electrical Engineering and Automation are highly recommended by society, while Computer Science remains extremely popular, potentially intensifying competition for related majors. The total number of candidates for the 2026 Jiangxi Province general college entrance examination is approximately 474,900, a slight increase from 472,480 in 2025, leading to a small expansion of the competitive base. Shanghai University is located in Shanghai, with strong regional appeal, attracting many candidates from Jiangxi Province. The university has a relatively large enrollment scale in Jiangxi Province (about 180 science students), making it one of its main sources of out-of-province students.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend in historical rankings, the slight expansion of the 2026 enrollment plan, the negative reputation that may suppress some application enthusiasm, and the slight increase in the total number of candidates, it is expected that the minimum ranking for science in 2026 will continue to shift slightly backward from the 2025 baseline of 9970. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 10,120, with a range of 9,620 to 10,620.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:

- Electronic Information (Future Technology College)
- Electronic Information (Electronic Information Engineering, Communication Engineering, etc.)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Science Experimental Class (Mathematics and Applied Mathematics, Applied Physics, etc.)
- Science Experimental Class (Qian Weichang College)
- Electrical (Mechanical Design, Manufacturing and Automation, etc.)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Materials (Applied Chemistry, Metallurgical Engineering, etc.)
- Economics (Economics, Finance, etc.)
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 9,620 to 10,620, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main application direction, with Tier 1 majors as a reach (especially Electronic Information), and Tier 3 majors as a safety choice. If the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 9,600), prioritize reaching for Tier 1 flagship majors. If the ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (e.g., around 10,600), focus mainly on Tier 3 majors with Tier 2 as a supplement.

学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project and Double First-Class university; in the 2026 Soft Science Chinese University Ranking, it is approximately 60th, with its ranking gradually declining from 43rd in 2021 to 60th in recent years, overall at an upper-middle 211 level. During the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, its reputation evaluation is clearly negative, mainly involving academic misconduct incidents, which may have a certain inhibitory effect on some candidates' application psychology.
